title: Former Attorney General KK Venugopal to release autobiography [Watch live stream]
description: Former Attorney General KK Venugopal will release his autobiography titled An Accidental Lawyer: My Adventures in Law and Life at an event in New Delhi on Tuesday evening.The book, authored by Venugopal and co-authored by Advocate Suhasini Sen, traces his journey in the legal profession, reflecting on his decades-long career before the Supreme Court and his tenure as Attorney General for India.The event will also feature conversations with journalist N Ram, politician Subhashini Ali and Advocate
